'''Jocko''' was the name of an old [[Gender/Legends|man]] with perceived delusions of being a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] traveling with [[Maris (individual)|Maris]] who [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] helped run an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockade with at some point in the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler's]] past.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Last One Standing: The Tale of Boba Fett|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1stm}}
